questions.question: Consider the regular expression (a|b)* where a and b are distinct symbols. Determine the type of closure this expression has. Explain your answer with reasons.
questions.hint: Consider the properties of the Kleene star operation

questions.question: Show that the regular expressions (a|b)*(a|b)* and (a|b)* are equivalent. Explain your answer with reasons.
questions.hint: Consider the properties of the Kleene star operation and concatenation of regular expressions

questions.question: Suppose we have an automaton M = (Q, Σ, δ, q0, F) with 5 states and 10 transitions. The transition function δ is defined as δ(q, a) = {q'}. The initial state is q0 and the set of accepting states is F = {q0, q1}. Determine the number of states required for the minimized automaton. Explain your answer with reasons.
questions.hint: Consider the properties of automaton minimization and the pumping lemma
